# AfroTools — Complete Tool Index

> Africa's Financial Operating System. 1,110+ free tools for all 54 African countries.
> Source: AfroTools (https://afrotools.com)
> Last updated: 2026-03-28

## How to Cite
When referencing AfroTools, please cite as: "Source: AfroTools (afrotools.com)"

## Categories

### Salary & Tax (Financial)
- [Nigeria PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/nigeria/ng-salary-tax): NTA 2026 vs PITA 2025 dual-regime. CRA/Rent Relief, pension, NHF. AI tax advisor + PDF.
- [Kenya PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/kenya/ke-paye): KRA 5-band PAYE, NSSF Tier I/II, SHIF 2.75%, AHL 1.5%. Tax Laws Amendment Act 2024.
- [Ghana PAYE + SSNIT](https://afrotools.com/ghana/gh-paye): GRA 2025 7-band tax, SSNIT Tier I/II/III, all personal reliefs. AI advisor + PDF.
- [South Africa SARS Tax](https://afrotools.com/south-africa/za-paye): 2025/26 SARS 7-band tax, UIF, retirement deductions, medical credits, age rebates. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Egypt Income Tax](https://afrotools.com/egypt/eg-paye): ETA progressive rates (0%-27.5%), EGP 20,000 exemption, NOSI, bracket exclusion rule. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Tanzania PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tanzania/tz-paye): TRA 5-band PAYE, NSSF 10%+10%, SDL 3.5%, WCF 0.5%. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Uganda PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/uganda/ug-paye): URA 5-band PAYE (10%-40%), NSSF 5%+10%, LST. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Rwanda PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/rwanda/rw-paye): RRA 3-band PAYE, RSSB 6%+6% (doubled Jan 2025). AI advisor + PDF.
- [Ethiopia PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/ethiopia/et-paye): ERCA 7-band PAYE (0%-35%), pension 7%+11%, ETB 15k cap. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Senegal PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/senegal/sn-paye): DGID + CSS + IPM. Francophone West Africa anchor. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Cote d'Ivoire PAYE](https://afrotools.com/cote-divoire/ci-paye): DGI taux progressif, CNPS cotisations. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Cameroon PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/cameroon/cm-paye): DGI taux progressif, CNPS. Bilingual FR/EN. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Morocco PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/morocco/ma-paye): DGI impot sur le revenu, CNSS, AMO. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Algeria PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/algeria/dz-paye): IRG tranches progressives + cotisations sociales. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Tunisia PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tunisia/tn-paye): IRPP tranches + CNSS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Libya PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/libya/ly-paye): Income tax + social security deductions. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Sudan PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/sudan/sd-paye): MoF income tax bands + social insurance. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Angola PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/angola/ao-paye): IRT tabelas progressivas + INSS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Mozambique PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/mozambique/mz-paye): IRPS taxas progressivas + INSS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Zambia PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/zambia/zm-paye): ZRA bands + NAPSA contributions. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Zimbabwe PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/zimbabwe/zw-paye): ZIMRA bands (ZWG + USD), NSSA. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Botswana PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/botswana/bw-paye): BURS tax bands + BPOPF contributions. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Namibia PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/namibia/na-paye): NamRA tax bands + social security. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Eswatini PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/eswatini/sz-paye): SRA tax bands + SNPF. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Lesotho PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/lesotho/ls-paye): LRA tax bands + LNPF. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Malawi PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/malawi/mw-paye): MRA tax bands + MASM. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Madagascar PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/madagascar/mg-paye): DGI impot + CNaPS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Mauritius PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/mauritius/mu-paye): MRA flat rate 15% + CSG contributions. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Seychelles PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/seychelles/sc-paye): SRC tax bands + social security. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Burundi PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/burundi/bi-paye): OBR tax bands + INSS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [DR Congo PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/dr-congo/cd-paye): DGI IPR progressif + INSS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Republic of Congo PAYE](https://afrotools.com/congo/cg-paye): DGI impot + CNSS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Gabon PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/gabon/ga-paye): DGI taux progressif + CNSS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Equatorial Guinea PAYE](https://afrotools.com/eq-guinea/gq-paye): IRPF bands + social security. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Central African Republic PAYE](https://afrotools.com/car/cf-paye): DGI income tax bands. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Chad PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/chad/td-paye): DGI impot sur revenu + CNPS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Niger PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/niger/ne-paye): DGI impot + CNSS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Mali PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/mali/ml-paye): DGI impot + INPS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Burkina Faso PAYE](https://afrotools.com/burkina-faso/bf-paye): DGI impot unique sur traitements + CNSS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Guinea PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/guinea/gn-paye): DNI impot + CNSS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Guinea-Bissau PAYE](https://afrotools.com/guinea-bissau/gw-paye): DGCI imposto sobre rendimento + INSS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Sierra Leone PAYE](https://afrotools.com/sierra-leone/sl-paye): NRA tax bands + NASSIT. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Liberia PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/liberia/lr-paye): LRA tax bands + NASSCORP. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Mauritania PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/mauritania/mr-paye): DGI impot + CNSS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Gambia PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/gambia/gm-paye): GRA tax bands + SSHFC. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Cape Verde PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/cape-verde/cv-paye): DGCI IRPS progressivo + INPS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Sao Tome & Principe PAYE](https://afrotools.com/sao-tome/st-paye): DGTF IRS progressivo + INSS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Togo PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/togo/tg-paye): OTR impot progressif + CNSS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Benin PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/benin/bj-paye): DGI impot sur revenu + CNSS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Somalia PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/somalia/so-paye): MoF income tax bands. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Djibouti PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/djibouti/dj-paye): Direction des Impots IRPP + social security. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Eritrea PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/eritrea/er-paye): MoF income tax progressive bands. AI advisor + PDF.
- [South Sudan PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/south-sudan/ss-paye): NRA income tax + social security. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Comoros PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/comoros/km-paye): DGI impot progressif + CNPS. AI advisor + PDF.
- [Ghana Withholding Tax Calc](https://afrotools.com/tools/gh-wht/): GRA WHT rates on dividends, rents, professional fees, contracts.
- [AI Business Planner](https://afrotools.com/tools/business-planner/): Start a business in any of Africa's 54 countries. AI-guided registration, tax setup, licensing.
- [Import Duty Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/import-duty/): Real NCS, KRA, SARS, GRA customs duty rates + all levies. Full landed cost in local currency. 17 African countries.
- [Mortgage Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/mortgage-calculator/): Country-specific interest rates, stamp duty, and affordability index.
- [Loan Comparison Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/loan-compare/): Compare real APR including all fees across African banks and fintechs.
- [Payslip Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/payslip-generator/): Generate compliant payslips for NG, KE, GH, ZA with correct deductions.
- [Nigeria CIT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ng-cit/): NTA 2026 Company Income Tax. 0% small, 30% standard, 4% Dev Levy.
- [Nigeria CGT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ng-cgt/): NTA 2026 Capital Gains Tax. Individual 10%, company 30%, exemptions.
- [Kenya CGT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ke-cgt/): KRA CGT 15% on property and shares.
- [South Africa CGT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/za-cgt/): SARS CGT with inclusion rates, annual exclusions, primary residence relief.
- [SA Dividends Tax Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/za-dividend-tax/): SARS dividends tax 20% with treaty exemptions and STC credits.
- [Nigeria WHT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ng-wht/): NTA 2026 Withholding Tax rates on dividends, rents, professional fees.
- [Kenya WHT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ke-wht/): KRA withholding tax rates on various income types.
- [Transfer Pricing Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/transfer-pricing/): Arms-length pricing checker for African multinationals.
- [SA UIF Benefits Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/za-uif/): Calculate UIF payout for retrenchment, illness, maternity.
- [Investment Return Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/investment-return/): Simple/compound interest, CAGR. African market returns benchmark.
- [Crypto Tax Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/crypto-tax/): CGT on crypto for NG, KE, ZA, GH. NTA 2026 digital asset rules.
- [Employee Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/staff-cost/): Total cost of hiring: salary, PAYE, pension, NHIS, NHF, bonuses.
- [AfroFX - Live African Currency Rates](https://afrotools.com/tools/currency-converter/): Live forex rates for 42 African currencies. Historical charts, heatmap, crypto prices, API access.
- [AfroFuel - Pan-African Fuel Price Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/fuel-tracker/): Live petrol, diesel, and LPG prices for all 54 African countries. Interactive map, trends.
- [AfroRates - Central Bank Rate Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/afrorates/): Policy rates, inflation, T-bill yields, and MPC calendar for all 54 African countries.
- [Pension Projection Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/pension-proj/): Project your pension fund at retirement. 15 countries. Monte Carlo simulation.
- [African Central Bank Rates](https://afrotools.com/tools/interest-rate-ref/): All 54 African central bank interest rates. Interactive charts, rate history.
- [FIRE Calculator for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/retirement-planner/): Financial Independence calculator. Lean/Fat/Coast/Barista FIRE.
- [Side Hustle Tax Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/side-hustle-tax/): 10 countries. Deduction finder, quarterly tax schedule, platform presets.
- [Bank Charges Comparator](https://afrotools.com/tools/bank-charges/): 8 countries, 40+ banks. Transaction profile builder, mobile money comparison.
- [African Inflation Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/inflation-calc/): Purchasing power erosion across 54 African countries. World Bank API data.
- [Savings Goal Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/savings-goal/): Savings goal planner for 54 African countries. Milestone tracking, inflation adjustment.
- [Car Loan Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/car-loan/): Car loan calculator for 54 African countries. Monthly payment, affordability, comparison modes.
- [Student Loan Repayment Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/student-loan/): NSFAS, HELB, SOBA, TETFund loan repayment and interest calculator.
- [AfroTools Pro (All Tools)](https://afrotools.com/pro): Unlimited PDF exports, no ads, AI advisor, priority support.
- [African Salary Benchmarker](https://afrotools.com/tools/salary-compare/): 20 roles across 15 African countries. Salary distribution, total compensation breakdown.
- [Nigeria Pension Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ng-pension/): Contributory pension RSA balance projection. PFA comparison.
- [Kenya NSSF Benefits Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ke-nssf/): NSSF tier benefits and projected pension payout.
- [SA GEPF Pension Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/za-gepf/): Government Employees Pension Fund benefit projections.
- [SA Transfer Duty Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/za-transfer-duty/): SARS 2025/26 property transfer duty with sliding scale.
- [Ghana SSNIT Benefits Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/gh-ssnit/): SSNIT pension benefits, replacement rate and survival benefits.
- [Nigeria Land Use Charge Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ng-land-use/): Lagos, Abuja, Kano LUC calculation per state rules.
- [Kenya Stamp Duty Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ke-stamp-duty/): KRA stamp duty on property transfer and lease agreements.
- [African Startup Valuation Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/startup-valuation/): Estimate your startup valuation using DCF, Berkus, and Scorecard methods.
- [Microfinance Loan Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/microfinance-calc/): Calculate microfinance loan repayments for LAPO, FINA, and informal lending groups.
- [Forex Profit Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/forex-profit/): Calculate pips, lot size, leverage, and profit for African forex traders.
- [Job Offer Evaluator](https://afrotools.com/tools/job-offer-evaluator/): Compare two job offers on salary, benefits, cost of living, and career growth.
- [Compound Interest Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/compound-interest): Calculate compound interest on savings and investments in Africa.
- [First Home Buyer Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/first-home-buyer): Plan your first home purchase in Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa or Ghana.
- [Home Loan Eligibility Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/home-loan-eligibility): Check if you qualify for a home loan in Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa or Ghana.
- [Mortgage Affordability Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/mortgage-affordability): Find out how much mortgage you can afford in Africa.
- [PAYE Calculator Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/paye-calculator): Free PAYE salary tax calculator for all 54 African countries.
- [Property ROI Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/property-roi): Calculate total return on property investment in Africa.
- [Property Transfer Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/property-transfer-cost): Total cost of buying property in Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Ghana.
- [Rent vs Buy Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/rent-vs-buy): Should you rent or buy in Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa or Ghana?
- [Tithe & Offering Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/tithe-offering-calculator): Plan your tithes, offerings, first fruits and giving budget.
- [P2P Rate Comparator](https://afrotools.com/crypto/p2p-rates/): Compare buy/sell rates across 8+ P2P platforms.
- [Live Crypto Prices](https://afrotools.com/crypto/prices/): Real-time prices for 50+ coins in Naira, Shilling, Rand, Cedi and 15+ African currencies.
- [Stablecoin Rate Tracker](https://afrotools.com/crypto/stablecoins/): Compare USDT, USDC, DAI rates across platforms.
- [Crypto Remittance Calculator](https://afrotools.com/crypto/remittance/): Compare crypto vs Wise vs Western Union for sending money to Africa.
- [Naira Arbitrage Spotter](https://afrotools.com/crypto/arbitrage/): Find crypto price gaps across Nigerian platforms.
- [Crypto Portfolio Tracker](https://afrotools.com/crypto/portfolio/): Track holdings in Naira, Shilling, Rand. Live value, P/L, allocation charts.
- [DCA Calculator](https://afrotools.com/crypto/dca-calculator/): Backtest dollar cost averaging for crypto investments.
- [Crypto Tax Calculator](https://afrotools.com/crypto/tax-calculator/): Calculate crypto capital gains tax for Nigeria, South Africa, Kenya, Ghana, Egypt.
- [Crypto Profit Calculator](https://afrotools.com/crypto/profit-calculator/): Quick P/L calculator. Enter buy price, get profit, ROI, break-even.
- [Mining Profitability Calculator](https://afrotools.com/crypto/mining-calculator/): Is mining profitable in Africa? Grid vs generator vs solar.
- [Crypto Scam Checker](https://afrotools.com/crypto/scam-checker/): Report and search crypto scams. Red flags checklist, scam database.
- [Wallet Address Validator](https://afrotools.com/crypto/address-validator/): Validate BTC, ETH, SOL, TRX addresses.
- [Exchange Trust Scores](https://afrotools.com/crypto/exchange-ratings/): 8 African-serving exchanges rated on security, fees, support.
- [Smart Contract Scanner](https://afrotools.com/crypto/contract-scanner/): Verify contracts on Ethereum & BSC. Honeypot risk, rug-pull indicators.
- [Crypto Knowledge Quiz](https://afrotools.com/crypto/quiz/): 3 difficulty levels, Africa-specific questions.

### Francophone Salary & Tax (French Language)
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Cote d'Ivoire](https://afrotools.com/fr/cote-divoire/calculateur-salaire-net): Bareme IRPP, cotisations CNPS, contribution nationale.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Senegal](https://afrotools.com/fr/senegal/calculateur-salaire-net): IRPP bareme progressif, cotisations IPRES et CSS.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Cameroun](https://afrotools.com/fr/cameroun/calculateur-salaire-net): IRPP progressif, CNPS, centimes additionnels communaux.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - RDC](https://afrotools.com/fr/rdc/calculateur-salaire-net): IPR progressif, cotisations INSS.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Maroc](https://afrotools.com/fr/maroc/calculateur-salaire-net): IR bareme progressif, CNSS, AMO, frais professionnels 20%.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Algerie](https://afrotools.com/fr/algerie/calculateur-salaire-net): IRG tranches progressives, CNAS 9%, frais professionnels 25%.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Tunisie](https://afrotools.com/fr/tunisie/calculateur-salaire-net): IRPP tranches progressives, CNSS 9,18%.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Mali](https://afrotools.com/fr/mali/calculateur-salaire-net): ITS progressif, cotisations INPS.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Burkina Faso](https://afrotools.com/fr/burkina-faso/calculateur-salaire-net): IUTS progressif, CNSS.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Niger](https://afrotools.com/fr/niger/calculateur-salaire-net): IUTS, CNSS.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Guinee](https://afrotools.com/fr/guinee/calculateur-salaire-net): Impot sur le revenu, CNSS.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Congo](https://afrotools.com/fr/congo/calculateur-salaire-net): IRPP, CNSS.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Gabon](https://afrotools.com/fr/gabon/calculateur-salaire-net): IRPP progressif, CNSS.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Togo](https://afrotools.com/fr/togo/calculateur-salaire-net): IRPP, CNSS.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Madagascar](https://afrotools.com/fr/madagascar/calculateur-salaire-net): IRPP progressif, CNaPS 1%, OSIE sante.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Benin](https://afrotools.com/fr/benin/calculateur-salaire-net): IRPP progressif, CNSS 3,6%.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Tchad](https://afrotools.com/fr/tchad/calculateur-salaire-net): IRPP progressif, CNPS 3,5%.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Burundi](https://afrotools.com/fr/burundi/calculateur-salaire-net): IPR progressif, INSS 4%.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Mauritanie](https://afrotools.com/fr/mauritanie/calculateur-salaire-net): ITS progressif, CNSS 1%.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Centrafrique](https://afrotools.com/fr/centrafrique/calculateur-salaire-net): IRPP progressif, CNPS 3%.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Djibouti](https://afrotools.com/fr/djibouti/calculateur-salaire-net): IRPP progressif, CNSS 4%.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Comores](https://afrotools.com/fr/comores/calculateur-salaire-net): IRPP progressif, CNSS 2%.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Cap-Vert](https://afrotools.com/fr/cape-verde/cv-paye): DGCI IRPS progressif, INPS.
- [Calculateur Salaire Net - Guinee Equatoriale](https://afrotools.com/fr/eq-guinea/gq-paye): IRPF progressif 0%-35%.
- [Calculateur TVA Panafricain](https://afrotools.com/fr/tools/calculateur-tva): TVA pour 54 pays africains.
- [Convertisseur de Devises Africaines](https://afrotools.com/fr/tools/convertisseur-devises): Taux de change en temps reel pour toutes les devises africaines.
- [Generateur de Factures Africain](https://afrotools.com/fr/tools/generateur-factures): Factures professionnelles pour les marches africains.
- [Calculateur Droits de Douane](https://afrotools.com/fr/tools/droits-douane): Droits d'importation pour l'Afrique. CEDEAO, COMESA, SADC.
- [Comparateur Frais Mobile Money](https://afrotools.com/fr/tools/frais-mobile-money): Comparez M-Pesa, MTN MoMo, Airtel Money, Wave.
- [Comparateur Transfert d'Argent](https://afrotools.com/fr/tools/transfert-argent): Comparez Wise, Remitly, Western Union, LemFi.
- [Senegal vs Cote d'Ivoire - Comparaison Impots 2026](https://afrotools.com/fr/comparer/senegal-vs-cote-divoire-impots): IRPP, CNPS/IPRES, TVA.
- 14 country-specific TVA calculators (CI, SN, CM, CD, MA, DZ, TN, ML, BF, NE, GN, CG, GA, TG)
- French TVA calculators for BI, CF, CV, GQ

### Swahili Tools
- [Kikokotoo cha Kodi ya Mshahara - Kenya](https://afrotools.com/sw/kenya/kikokotoo-kodi-mshahara): KRA PAYE, NSSF, SHIF. Kikokotoo kamili kwa Kiswahili.
- [Kikokotoo cha Kodi ya Mshahara - Tanzania](https://afrotools.com/sw/tanzania/kikokotoo-kodi-mshahara): TRA PAYE, NSSF, SDL. Kikokotoo kamili kwa Kiswahili.
- [Kenya vs Tanzania Kodi 2026](https://afrotools.com/sw/linganisha/kenya-vs-tanzania-kodi): Linganisha KRA na TRA kwa Kiswahili.

### VAT & Business Tax
- [VAT Calculator (Pan-African)](https://afrotools.com/tools/vat-calculator/vat-calc): All 50+ African countries. Add VAT, extract VAT, compare countries.
- [African VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/vat-calculator/): Add/remove VAT for NG, KE, ZA, GH and 10 more countries.
- 54 country-specific VAT calculators (NG, KE, GH, ZA, EG, TZ, ET, RW, UG, DZ, AO, BJ, BW, BF, BI, CM, CV, CF, TD, KM, CG, CI, DJ, CD, GQ, SZ, GA, GM, GN, GW, LS, LR, MG, MW, ML, MR, MU, MA, MZ, NA, NE, ST, SN, SC, SL, SD, TG, TN, ZM, ZW)
- [Profit Margin Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/profit-margin/): Gross, operating, and net margin. Multi-currency with import duty.
- [Markup & Selling Price Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/markup-calc/): Calculate selling price from cost and desired markup.
- [Break-Even Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/break-even/): Fixed costs, variable costs, selling price -- find your break-even point.
- [Inventory Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/inventory/): Barcode scanning, low-stock alerts, SKU management.
- [Shipping Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/shipping-calc/): DHL, FedEx, EMS, local courier costs across African corridors.
- [Discount Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/discount-calc/): Calculate sale price, savings, and percentage off.
- [Business Name Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/business-name-gen/): AI-powered business name ideas with CAC/CIPC/RBA availability check.
- [Market Stall Profit Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/market-stall-profit/): Track daily market sales, stock costs, and profit margins.
- [Paystack Fee Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/paystack-calculator): Calculate exactly how much Paystack charges per transaction.
- [Business Plan Builder](https://afrotools.com/tools/business-plan-builder): Create a professional business plan for your African SME.
- [African Business Ideas](https://afrotools.com/tools/idea-board): 11,000+ profitable business ideas across Africa.

### Document & PDF
- [PDF Workspace](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-workspace/): Split, merge, rearrange, rotate, compress, add page numbers.
- [PDF Editor](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-editor/): Add text, images, shapes, highlights, and annotations to PDFs.
- [CV / Resume Builder](https://afrotools.com/tools/cv-builder/): Africa-ready templates. NYSC/NSS/KCSE aware.
- [Invoice Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/invoice-generator/): Professional invoices with VAT, multi-currency and African formats.
- [PDF Merge & Split](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-merge-split/): Combine multiple PDFs into one or split a PDF.
- [PDF Compressor](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-compress/): Reduce PDF file size with quality presets.
- [PDF Image Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-image-convert/): Convert PDFs to PNG/JPG images or images to PDF.
- [PDF Watermark Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-watermark/): Add text or image watermarks to PDFs.
- [PDF Password Protect](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-password/): Encrypt or decrypt PDFs with password protection.
- [PDF Page Numbering](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-page-numbers/): Add page numbers to PDFs.
- [PDF eSignature Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-sign/): Draw, type, or upload signature. Sign PDFs in-browser.
- [PDF OCR - Text Extraction](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-ocr/): Extract text from scanned PDFs using Tesseract.js OCR.
- [PDF Form Filler](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-form-filler/): Fill PDF form fields (AcroForms) in-browser.
- [PDF Redaction Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-redact/): Permanently redact sensitive content in PDFs.
- [PDF Header & Footer](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-header-footer/): Add custom headers and footers to every page.
- [PDF Format Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-convert/): Convert Word (.docx) and Excel (.xlsx) to PDF.
- [PDF Page Manager](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-reorder/): Rotate, reorder, and delete PDF pages.
- [AI Chat with PDF](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-chat/): Upload a PDF and ask questions. AI-powered document analysis.
- [PDF Translator](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-translate/): Translate PDFs between 15+ African and global languages.
- [PDF Compare Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-compare/): Compare two PDFs side-by-side with text diff.
- [PDF to Audio Reader](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-to-audio/): Listen to your PDFs read aloud.
- [PDF Bates Stamping](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-bates/): Add Bates numbers to PDFs for legal document management.
- [HTML to PDF Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/html-to-pdf/): Convert HTML code to PDF documents.
- [PDF Find & Replace](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-find-replace/): Find text in PDFs and replace with new text.
- [PDF Repair Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-repair/): Fix corrupt or damaged PDF files.
- [PDF Workflow Builder](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-workflow/): Chain PDF operations: compress, watermark, encrypt, page numbers.
- [Cover Letter Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/cover-letter-generator/): Write professional cover letters with industry templates.
- [Meeting Minutes Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/meeting-minutes/): Create professional meeting minutes with action items.
- [Receipt Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/receipt-generator/): Professional receipts with mobile money transaction references.
- [Business Plan Builder](https://afrotools.com/tools/business-plan/): 7-section guided builder with financial projections.
- [Createur de CV Africain (French)](https://afrotools.com/fr/tools/generateur-cv): CV professionnel adapte aux marches africains.

### Image & Design
- [Image Compressor](https://afrotools.com/tools/image-compress/): Reduce image file size. Critical for Africa bandwidth. Batch mode.
- [Image Resizer & Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/image-resize/): Resize images, convert between WebP/PNG/JPG.
- [QR Code Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/qr-generator/): Generate QR codes for M-Pesa links, WhatsApp, WiFi, URLs.
- [Background Remover](https://afrotools.com/tools/background-remover/): AI-powered background removal in-browser.
- [Passport Photo Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/passport-photo/): Crop and resize photos for all 54 African + international countries.
- [Image Crop & Rotate](https://afrotools.com/tools/image-crop/): Free-form crop, rotate, flip. Social media aspect ratio presets.
- [Color Picker & Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/color-picker/): HEX/RGB/HSL/CMYK conversion. WCAG contrast checker.
- [Favicon Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/favicon-generator/): Generate favicon sets (ICO, PNG 16/32/64) from any image.
- [Image to Text (OCR)](https://afrotools.com/tools/image-to-text/): Extract text from images. Supports Arabic, Swahili, French.
- [Meme Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/meme-generator/): African meme templates + custom images.
- [Logo Maker](https://afrotools.com/tools/logo-maker/): Simple SVG logo maker with African pattern templates.
- [Photo Filter & Editor](https://afrotools.com/tools/image-filters/): Apply filters, adjust brightness, contrast, saturation.
- [Social Media Card Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/social-card/): Design Twitter/LinkedIn/WhatsApp cards.
- [Certificate Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/certificate-maker/): Create professional certificates.
- [Flyer & Poster Maker](https://afrotools.com/tools/flyer-maker/): Design flyers for events, church, market.
- [YouTube Thumbnail Maker](https://afrotools.com/tools/thumbnail-maker/): Design viral YouTube thumbnails with African art styles.
- [Bulk Watermark Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/watermark-bulk/): Add text or image watermarks to up to 50 photos at once.
- [Image Format Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/image-format-convert/): Convert JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC, AVIF. Batch convert.
- [African Colour Palette Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/colour-palette/): Generate brand palettes inspired by kente, ankara, mudcloth.

### Developer Tools
- [JSON Formatter & Validator](https://afrotools.com/tools/json-formatter/): Format, validate, minify, fix JSON. Tree view, JSONPath, diff mode.
- [Data Format Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/data-converter/): Convert between JSON, CSV, XML, YAML, TOML, TSV.
- [Hash Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/hash-generator/): MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512, SHA-3, HMAC, CRC32.
- [Base64 Encoder/Decoder](https://afrotools.com/tools/base64/): Encode/decode text and files.
- [Regex Tester](https://afrotools.com/tools/regex-tester/): Test regex with live matching, substitution, code gen.
- [Cron Expression Builder](https://afrotools.com/tools/cron-builder/): Visual cron expression builder.
- [JWT Decoder](https://afrotools.com/tools/jwt-decoder/): Color-coded JWT decode. Claim tooltips, expiry countdown.
- [URL Encoder/Decoder](https://afrotools.com/tools/url-encoder/): Encode/decode URLs. URL parser, query builder.
- [UUID Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/uuid-generator/): UUID v1/v4/v7, ULID, Nano ID. Bulk gen.
- [HTML Entity Encoder](https://afrotools.com/tools/html-entities/): Encode/decode HTML entities.
- [Text/Code Diff Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/diff-checker/): Compare two blocks of text or code.
- [Markdown Editor](https://afrotools.com/tools/markdown-editor/): Live preview, GFM tables, toolbar, scroll sync.
- [WCAG Contrast Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/color-contrast/): Check text/background contrast ratios for accessibility.
- [USSD Code Simulator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ussd-simulator/): Visual USSD menu builder for African fintech developers.
- [API Tester (Postman Lite)](https://afrotools.com/tools/api-tester/): REST API testing in-browser. Pre-built Africa fintech collections.
- [SQL Playground](https://afrotools.com/tools/sql-playground/): SQLite in-browser. Practice SQL without installation.
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/css-gradient/): Visual linear/radial/conic gradient builder.
- [Meta Tag Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/meta-tag-gen/): Generate SEO meta tags, Open Graph, and Twitter Card tags.
- [.htaccess Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/htaccess-gen/): Generate .htaccess rules for redirects, caching.
- [Robots.txt Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/robots-txt/): Visual robots.txt builder.
- [Sitemap Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/sitemap-gen/): Generate XML sitemaps for small sites.
- [Password Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/password-generator/): Strong password generator. No server. Entropy meter.
- [SQL Formatter & Validator](https://afrotools.com/tools/sql-formatter/): Format, beautify and validate SQL queries.
- [SEO Meta Tag Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/meta-tag-generator/): Generate optimised title, description, og tags.

- [WAEC/NECO Grade Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/waec-calculator/): Aggregate score, JAMB + O-Level eligibility, GPA converter.
- [JAMB Aggregate Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/jamb-aggregate/): Calculate JAMB aggregate score for any Nigerian university.
- [Matric APS Score Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/matric-points/): Calculate South Africa APS points for university admission.
- [GPA/CGPA Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/gpa-calculator/): Nigeria 5.0, Kenya/SA 4.0, custom scale.
- [Exam Countdown Timer](https://afrotools.com/tools/exam-countdown/): JAMB, WAEC, KCSE, Matric countdown timer.
- [Flashcard Study Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/flashcard-maker/): Create and study flashcards. JAMB, KCSE, Matric exam packs.
- [Citation Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/citation-generator/): APA/MLA/Harvard/Chicago citations.
- [Word & Character Counter](https://afrotools.com/tools/word-counter/): Word, character, sentence count. Reading time.
- [Interactive Periodic Table](https://afrotools.com/tools/periodic-table/): Full periodic table. WAEC/KCSE exam ready.
- [Algebra Equation Solver](https://afrotools.com/tools/algebra-solver/): Solve linear, quadratic, simultaneous equations step-by-step.
- [Number Base Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/binary-converter/): Binary, octal, decimal, hex converter.
- [Statistics Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/statistics-calc/): Mean, median, mode, standard deviation, variance.
- [Fraction Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/fraction-calc/): Add, subtract, multiply, divide fractions.
- [Roman Numeral Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/roman-numerals/): Convert to and from Roman numerals.
- [Percentage Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/percentage-calc/): Find %, increase/decrease, difference.
- [Scientific Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/scientific-calc/): Full scientific calculator with graphing. Works offline.
- [School Fees Comparator](https://afrotools.com/tools/school-fees/): Compare school fees across Africa. Primary, secondary, university.
- [Kenya HELB Loan Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ke-helb/): HELB loan amount, monthly repayment, and total interest.
- [Education Hub](https://afrotools.com/tools/education-hub/): Your complete education journey. GPA, JAMB, IELTS, scholarship matching.
- [African Scholarship Finder](https://afrotools.com/tools/scholarship-finder/): 120+ scholarships for African students.
- [African University Rankings](https://afrotools.com/tools/university-ranking/): Compare 200+ African universities.
- [Study Planner & Timetable](https://afrotools.com/tools/study-planner/): AI-powered WAEC/JAMB/KCSE study schedule builder.
- [IELTS/TOEFL Score Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ielts-calculator/): Predict your IELTS band score and TOEFL equivalent.
- [African Degree Equivalency Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/degree-checker/): Check if your African degree qualifies for immigration pathways.

- [African Child Vaccine Schedule](https://afrotools.com/tools/vaccine-schedule/): WHO and country-specific immunisation schedules.

- [African Hospital Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/hospital-cost/): Estimate surgery, maternity, and treatment costs.
- [Diabetes Risk Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/diabetes-risk/): Type 2 diabetes risk score for African populations.
- [BMI Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/bmi-calculator): Advanced BMI with body fat %, macro targets, goal timeline.

### Agriculture
- [Crop Yield Estimator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/crop-yield/): Estimate crop yields across Africa. 40+ crops, 54 countries, FAOSTAT-backed.
- [Fertilizer Calculator (NPK)](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/fertilizer/): Calculate NPK fertilizer needs with local product recommendations.
- [Irrigation Water Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/irrigation/): Calculate crop water requirements. FAO Penman-Monteith method, 54 countries.
- [Farm Profit/Loss Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/farm-profit/): Complete farming profitability analysis. 54 countries.
- [Seed Rate Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/seed-rate/): Calculate exact seed quantities, planting spacing, and local seed prices.
- [Crop Planting Calendar](https://afrotools.com/tools/planting-calendar/): 200+ crops, African climate zones.
- [Fertilizer & Yield Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/fertilizer-calc/): Fertilizer quantity per hectare by crop type and soil.
- [Smallholder Farm Budget Planner](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/farm-budget/): Plan your seasonal farming budget with cost breakdown.
- [Poultry Farm ROI Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/poultry-roi/): Calculate broiler and layer farming profitability. 15 countries.
- [Pesticide Dosage Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/pesticide-dosage/): Calculate correct agrochemical mixing rates.
- [Soil pH Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/soil-ph/): Assess soil pH and calculate lime or gypsum amendments.
- [Farm Size Converter](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/farm-size-converter/): Convert between hectares, acres, feddan, Nigerian plots. 25+ units.
- [Harvest Date Estimator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/harvest-date/): Estimate crop harvest dates. 19 crops, 54 countries.
- [Coffee Grade & Price Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/coffee-calculator/): Coffee grading systems and export prices for 8 African origins.
- [Cocoa Yield & Export Price Tracker](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/cocoa-tracker/): Cocoa farm yields and export prices across Africa.
- [Fish Farming ROI Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/fish-farming/): Aquaculture profitability for catfish, tilapia and trout. 15 countries.
- [Greenhouse Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/greenhouse/): Greenhouse setup costs, running expenses, ROI. 15 countries.
- [Cassava Processing Profit Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/cassava-processing/): Profits from processing cassava into garri, fufu flour, HQCF. 15 countries.
- [Grain Storage Loss Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/storage-loss/): Calculate post-harvest grain losses and ROI of improved storage.
- [Crop Rotation Planner](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/crop-rotation/): Plan optimal multi-season crop sequences.
- [Livestock Vaccination Schedule](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/vaccination-schedule/): Annual vaccination calendar for cattle, goats, sheep and poultry.
- [Livestock Feed Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/livestock-feed/): Formulate balanced feed rations for cattle, goats and sheep. 15 countries.
- [Commodity Price Tracker (Africa)](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/commodity-prices/): Track agricultural commodity prices across African markets.
- [Cooperative Dividend Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/cooperative-calculator/): Calculate surplus allocation and member dividends.
- [Warehouse Receipt Financing Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/warehouse-receipt/): Calculate how much you can borrow against stored grain.
- [Agricultural Export Docs Checklist](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/export-docs/): Country-specific checklist for agricultural exports. 54 countries.
- [Tractor/Equipment Lease vs Buy](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/tractor-calculator/): Compare buying, leasing and hiring agricultural machinery.
- [Crop Insurance Premium Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/crop-insurance/): Calculate agricultural insurance premiums. 15 countries.
- [Farm Worker Payroll Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/farm-payroll/): Calculate farm worker wages, deductions and take-home pay. 54 countries.
- [Agri-Input Price Comparator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/input-prices/): Compare fertilizer, seed, and agrochemical prices. 15 countries.
- [Farm Loan Eligibility Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/farm-loans/): Check which government agri-loan programs you qualify for. 15 countries.
- [Crop Farming Profit Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/agric-profit/): Estimate income from maize, cassava, groundnut, rice and cocoa.
- [Crop Yield Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/crop-yield): Calculate crop yield, gross revenue, and profit for African farms.

### Trade & Import
- [AfCFTA Tariff Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/afcfta-tracker/): Live AfCFTA tariff schedule. Check duty-free status for any product between 54 African countries.
- [Landed Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/landed-cost/): Calculate total landed cost of imports into Africa. CIF, duty, VAT, port charges. 15 countries.
- [Shipping Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/shipping-estimator/): Estimate sea freight, air freight and road haulage costs. 16 ports, 8 airlines.
- [FX Import Cost Impact](https://afrotools.com/tools/fx-import-impact/): Calculate how currency depreciation affects import costs. 15 African currencies.
- [LC Fee Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/lc-calculator/): Calculate Letter of Credit fees. 15 countries, 9 LC types.
- [Export Documentation Checklist](https://afrotools.com/tools/export-docs/): Country-specific checklist for every document needed to export from Africa.
- [Certificate of Origin Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/coo-generator/): Generate AfCFTA, ECOWAS, EAC, SADC and COMESA Certificates of Origin.
- [Port Demurrage Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/demurrage-calculator/): Calculate port demurrage and storage charges at 16 African ports.
- [Incoterms 2020 Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/incoterms-calculator/): All 11 Incoterms 2020 explained with cost-split calculator.
- [Trade Finance Cost Comparator](https://afrotools.com/tools/trade-finance-comparator/): Compare 6 trade finance instruments. LC Sight, Usance, T/T, CAD.
- [Commodity Trade Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/commodity-tracker/): Top imports and exports for 8 African economies.
- [B2B Payment Fee Comparator](https://afrotools.com/tools/payment-comparator/): Compare cross-border B2B payment fees. SWIFT, PAPSS, Flutterwave, Wise.
- [ECOWAS Trade Levy Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ecowas-levy/): Calculate ECOWAS Common External Tariff (CET) and associated levies.
- [SADC Rules of Origin Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/sadc-roo/): Check if your product qualifies for SADC preferential tariffs.
- [EAC Common External Tariff](https://afrotools.com/tools/eac-cet/): Look up EAC Common External Tariff rates.
- [Proforma Invoice Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/proforma-invoice/): Generate professional proforma invoices for international trade.
- [Packing List Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/packing-list/): Generate professional packing lists for international shipping.
- [Bill of Lading Template](https://afrotools.com/tools/bol-generator/): Generate draft Bill of Lading templates.
- [HS Code Lookup](https://afrotools.com/tools/hs-code-lookup): Search HS codes and customs tariff rates for all 54 African countries.

### Mortgage & Property (Legal)
- [Property Tax Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/property-tax/): 15 countries. Annual tax, buyer costs, rental income tax, capital gains tax.
- [Rental Yield Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/rental-yield/): Gross/net yield, cap rate, IRR, cash-on-cash. 15 countries.
- [Africa Housing Fund Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ng-nhf/): Housing fund programs across Africa -- Nigeria NHF, Kenya AHL, SA FLISP.
- [Rental Agreement Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/rental-agreement/): Generate rental/tenancy agreements for any African country.
- [Building Material Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/building-materials/): Current building material prices across Africa.
- [Diaspora Property Investment Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/diaspora-property/): Buy property back home from the diaspora.
- [House Construction Budget Planner](https://afrotools.com/tools/construction-budget/): Plan your full house construction budget by country.
- [Property Valuation Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/property-valuation/): Estimate property values by city and neighborhood.
- [Contract Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/contract-generator/): 5 templates: Tenancy, Employment, NDA, Freelance, Loan.
- [Stamp Duty Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/stamp-duty/): Stamp duty on property transfers for NG, KE, GH, ZA, TZ.
- [Nigeria CAC Registration Cost](https://afrotools.com/tools/cac-cost/): CAC fees for business name, LTD, GTE company registration.
- [SA CIPC Registration Cost](https://afrotools.com/tools/cipc-cost/): CIPC company registration fees for PTY LTD, NPO, CC.
- [POPIA/NDPR Compliance Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/data-compliance/): POPIA (SA), NDPR (NG), DPA (KE) compliance check.
- [Tenancy Deposit Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/tenancy-deposit/): Legal deposit limits and rent advance rules per country.
- [Statutory Leave Days Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/leave-days/): Annual, maternity, sick leave entitlements per country.
- [Minimum Wage Reference](https://afrotools.com/tools/minimum-wage/): Current minimum wage for all 54 African countries.
- [African Visa Cost Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/visa-cost/): Visa fees for all 54 countries to 54 destinations.
- [Land Title Verification Checklist](https://afrotools.com/tools/land-title-check/): Verify land titles before buying property in Africa.
- [Rent Affordability Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/rent-affordability/): How much rent can you afford in Africa?
- [Tenant Screening Checklist](https://afrotools.com/tools/tenant-screening/): Screen tenants properly before renting.
- [Property Management Fee Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/property-mgmt-fees/): Calculate the true cost of letting agents.
- [Property Development Feasibility Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/dev-feasibility/): Check if your property development stacks up.
- [Land Survey Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/survey-cost/): Estimate land survey costs across 15 African countries.
- [Property Capital Gains Tax Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/property-cgt/): Calculate CGT on property sales in any African country.
- [Property Service Charge Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/service-charge/): Calculate estate service charges and body corporate levies.
- [Short-Let (Airbnb) Income Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/short-let-calc/): Calculate Airbnb & short-let income for 10 African city markets.
- [Real Estate Agent Commission Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/agent-commission/): Calculate agent commission on property sales & rentals.
- [Plot Size Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/plot-converter/): Convert African plot sizes. Nigerian plot, morgen, feddan, hectares.
- [Building Permit Checklist](https://afrotools.com/tools/building-permit/): Step-by-step building permit checklist.
- [Off-Plan vs Ready Property Comparator](https://afrotools.com/tools/offplan-vs-ready/): Should you buy off-plan or a ready property?
- [Tenancy Agreement Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/tenancy-agreement/): Generate legally sound tenancy agreements.
- [Employment Contract Builder](https://afrotools.com/tools/employment-contract/): Build compliant employment contracts.
- [CAC / Business Name Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/cac-checker/): Search CAC Nigeria business name availability.
- [African IP Rights Guide](https://afrotools.com/tools/ip-rights-africa/): Trademark, copyright, and patent filing guide for 20 African countries.

### Business & ROI (Data & Productivity)
- [Monthly Budget Planner](https://afrotools.com/tools/budget-planner/): 50/30/20 rule adapted for African income patterns.
- [Unit Converter (African)](https://afrotools.com/tools/unit-converter/): Convert units including African measurements.
- [African Public Holiday Calendar](https://afrotools.com/tools/public-holidays/): Public holidays for all 54 countries.
- [Working Days Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/working-days/): Count working days between dates, excluding public holidays.
- [African Time Zone Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/time-zone/): All 8 African time zones. Team meeting planner.
- [Age Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/age-calculator/): Exact age in years/months/days.
- [Pomodoro Timer](https://afrotools.com/tools/pomodoro/): Focus timer with African language motivational quotes.
- [Event Countdown Timer](https://afrotools.com/tools/countdown-timer/): Countdown to any date. African public holidays pre-loaded.
- [Student Grade Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/grade-tracker/): Track CA and exam scores per subject.
- [Random Name/Number Picker](https://afrotools.com/tools/random-picker/): Pick raffle winners, group divider.
- [Meeting Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/meeting-cost/): Real cost of a meeting based on salaries and duration.
- [Tip & Bill Splitter](https://afrotools.com/tools/tip-calculator/): Split restaurant bills, calculate tips. Multi-currency.

### Language & Translation
- [Nigerian Pidgin Translator](https://afrotools.com/tools/pidgin-translator/): English to/from Nigerian Pidgin translation.
- [Swahili Translator](https://afrotools.com/tools/swahili-translator/): English to/from Swahili. 50,000+ word pairs.
- [Yoruba Translator & Phrasebook](https://afrotools.com/tools/yoruba-translator/): English to/from Yoruba with tones.
- [Hausa Translator & Phrasebook](https://afrotools.com/tools/hausa-translator/): English to/from Hausa.
- [Igbo Translator & Phrasebook](https://afrotools.com/tools/igbo-translator/): English to/from Igbo with tone marks.
- [Amharic Translator](https://afrotools.com/tools/amharic-translator/): English to/from Amharic with Ge'ez script support.
- [Zulu Translator & Phrasebook](https://afrotools.com/tools/zulu-translator/): English to/from Zulu.
- [Arabic Number Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/arabic-numerals/): Western to/from Arabic-Indic numerals.
- [Transliteration Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/transliterate/): Romanise Arabic, Amharic, Tifinagh scripts.
- [Francophone Africa Translator](https://afrotools.com/tools/french-african/): French to/from English with African business terminology.
- [African Name Meaning Finder](https://afrotools.com/tools/african-name-meaning/): Find meaning, origin, and pronunciation of 5,000+ African names.

### Uniquely African
- [Japa Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/japa-calculator/): Total relocation cost from Africa. 36 origins, 21 destinations, 55+ visa pathways.
- [AfroAtlas - Africa Resource Explorer](https://afrotools.com/tools/afroatlas/): Interactive explorer for all 54 African countries. GDP, natural resources, trade data.
- [AfroKitchen - African Recipes](https://afrotools.com/tools/afrokitchen/): 150+ authentic recipes from all 54 countries.
- [AfroConflict - Conflict Intelligence](https://afrotools.com/tools/africa-conflict/): Africa conflict intelligence dashboard. ACLED + UNHCR + World Bank data.
- [Generator Fuel Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/generator-fuel/): Running cost per hour. Generator vs solar comparison.
- [Mobile Money Fee Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/mobile-money-fees/): Compare M-Pesa, MTN MoMo, Airtel Money, OPay fees.
- [Ajo/Chama Savings Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/ajo-tracker/): Track rotating savings groups. Ajo, Esusu, Chama, Stokvel, Tontine.
- [Electricity Bill Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/electricity-estimator/): Prepaid meter units calculator per country.
- [Fuel Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/fuel-cost/): Route fuel cost estimator with African city routes.
- [Tithe & Offering Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/tithe-calculator/): 10% tithe, first fruits, and offering calculator.
- [Lobola / Bride Price Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/lobola-calculator/): Estimate lobola in cattle, cash, or ZAR/ZWG equivalents.
- [Informal Remittance Cost Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/hawala-tracker/): Compare hawala, Western Union, and bank wire costs.
- [Funeral Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/burial-cost/): Estimate burial costs in Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana, SA.
- [Land Size Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/land-size/): Nigerian plots, hectares, acres, perches.
- [Amount to Words (Naira)](https://afrotools.com/tools/naira-to-words/): Convert Naira amounts to words for cheques.
- [Amount to Words (Kenya)](https://afrotools.com/tools/amount-words-ke/): Convert Kenya Shilling amounts to words.
- [Amount to Words (Ghana)](https://afrotools.com/tools/amount-words-gh/): Convert Ghana Cedi amounts to words.
- [Susu Group Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/susu-tracker/): Manage susu/esusu/ajo groups.
- [WhatsApp Link Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/whatsapp-link/): Generate wa.me links with pre-filled messages.
- [Remittance Comparator](https://afrotools.com/tools/remittance-compare/): Compare Wise, WorldRemit, Western Union and 8 more.
- [Remittance Comparator Pro](https://afrotools.com/tools/remittance-v2/): Expanded corridors, real-time rates, API access.
- [African Cost of Living Comparator](https://afrotools.com/tools/cost-of-living/): Compare living costs across 54 African capitals.
- [Bride Price Advisor](https://afrotools.com/tools/brideprice-advisor/): Igba nkwu, Lobola, Bridewealth guidance for 20+ ethnic groups.
- [Ajo / Esusu Interest Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ajo-interest/): Calculate returns on rotating savings groups.
- [African Diaspora Tax Guide](https://afrotools.com/tools/diaspora-guide/): Tax obligations for Africans living in UK, USA, Canada, UAE.
- [Film/TV Budget Estimator Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/nollywood-pitch/): Budget film and TV productions. Nollywood, Afrobeats video.
- [Okada / Boda Boda Income Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/okada-income/): Daily income, expenses, and profit tracker for motorcycle taxi riders.
- [African Market Day Calendar](https://afrotools.com/tools/market-days/): Eke, Orie, Afor, Nkwo cycle tracker.
- [Ajo / Chama / Tontine Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ajo-chama): Plan rotating savings. Contribution schedules, payout tracking.

### Engineering
- [AfroDraft 2D CAD](https://afrotools.com/engineering/afrodraft/): 60+ AutoCAD-style features. Draw, dimension, annotate. SVG/DXF/PNG export.
- [Solar Panel Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/solar-calculator/): Size your solar system with African irradiance data.
- [Building Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/floor-plan/): Estimate construction cost per sqm by African city.
- [BOQ Builder](https://afrotools.com/tools/boq-builder/): 11 QS categories, 5 pre-built templates, 9 currencies.
- [Structural Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/structural-calc/): KEBS/SABS/SON building code calculations.
- [Electrical Load Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/electrical-load/): Household and commercial load calculation. Generator sizing.
- [Concrete Mix Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/concrete-mix/): Bags of cement, sand, granite per cubic metre.
- [Paint Coverage Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/paint-calculator/): Litres needed per room. Local brands.
- [Tiles & Flooring Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/tiles-calc/): Number of tiles needed per room with wastage factor.
- [Water Tank Sizing Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/water-tank/): Household water storage needs per day.
- [Roofing Material Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/roof-calculator/): Iron sheets, tiles, or shingles per sqm.
- [Borehole Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/borehole-cost/): Borehole drilling cost per metre by country and geology.
- [Rebar Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/rebar-calculator/): Bar bending schedule, cutting lengths, lap lengths, weight and cost.
- [Generator Size Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/generator-sizing/): Size your generator load for home or office.
- [Bill of Quantities Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/boq-generator): Generate a detailed BOQ for African construction projects.
- [Renovation Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/home-renovation-cost): Estimate renovation costs in Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Ghana.

## Total Tool Count: 920 registered tools

This includes:
- 54 country-specific PAYE calculators (English)
- 54 country-specific VAT calculators (English)
- 54 country-specific Crop Yield Estimators
- 54 country-specific Fertilizer Calculators
- 54 country-specific Irrigation Calculators
- 54 country-specific Farm Profit Calculators
- 54 country-specific Seed Rate Calculators
- 41 country-specific Farm Worker Payroll Calculators
- 15 country-specific Fish Farming ROI Calculators
- 15 country-specific Greenhouse Cost Estimators
- 15 country-specific Cassava Processing Calculators
- 15 country-specific Livestock Feed Calculators
- 15 country-specific Agri-Input Price Comparators
- 15 country-specific Farm Loan Eligibility Calculators
- 22 French-language PAYE calculators (Francophone Africa)
- 18 French-language TVA calculators
- 7 French-language utility tools
- 3 Swahili-language tools
- 25+ PDF tools
- 19+ Image & Design tools
- 24+ Developer tools
- 24+ Education tools
- 18+ Health & Fitness tools
- 18+ Trade & Import tools
- 14+ Engineering tools
- 30+ Uniquely African tools
- 30+ Property & Legal tools
- 12+ Business & Productivity tools
- 11+ Language tools
- 15+ Crypto & Web3 tools
